# ADR index

| ADR | Title | Status |
|-----|-------|--------|
| [0001](0001-plain-language-error-output.md) | Error output names the failure and the fix | Accepted |
| [0002](0002-monthly-release-cadence.md) | Releases ship on a monthly cadence | Accepted |
| [0003](0003-conventional-commit-subjects.md) | Commit subjects follow the conventional format | Accepted |
| [0004](0004-documentation-in-american-english.md) | Documentation is written in American English | Accepted |
